quick_start.why: Enter plan mode — Claude proposes changes for your review before touching anything. Use this for every non-trivial task.
Bootstraps CLAUDE.md in your project so Claude understands your codebase rules, stack, and preferences from day one.
Edit your persistent memory files. What Claude remembers across sessions lives here.
Compress the conversation when context gets long. Keeps Claude sharp without starting over.
Interactive viewer for all uncommitted changes. Browse per-turn diffs with arrow keys.
Control exactly what Claude can do automatically vs. what requires your approval.
Connect external tools — Slack, Jira, Google Drive, GitHub — into Claude's context.
Spawn parallel agents to execute large-scale changes across your codebase simultaneously.
See token usage and spending at any point. Stay on top of your budget.
Diagnose installation issues instantly. Run this first when something feels off.

commands.description: Clear conversation history and free up context window
Resume a conversation by ID or name, or open interactive picker
Create a branch of the current conversation at this point to explore a different approach
Rename the current session. Auto-generates name from history if no name given
Rewind conversation and code to a previous point, or summarize from a selected message
Ask a quick side question without adding to conversation history. Full context visibility, no tool access, low cost
commands.example: /btw what does this function actually return?

commands.description: Exit Claude Code
Open Settings interface — theme, model, output style, preferences
Change color theme (light/dark variants, colorblind-accessible, ANSI themes)
Set prompt bar color for the current session
Select or change AI model. Takes effect immediately. Shortcuts: sonnet, opus
Set model effort level. low/medium/high persist; max is session-only (Opus 4.6 only); auto resets to default
Toggle fast mode on/off for quicker responses
Toggle Vim editing mode for the input prompt
Open or create keybindings configuration file at ~/.claude/keybindings.json
Configure terminal keybindings for Shift+Enter and other shortcuts
commands.notes: Only shown for terminals that need it

commands.description: Configure the terminal status line. Describe what you want or auto-configure
commands.example: /statusline show git branch and model name

commands.description: Edit CLAUDE.md memory files, enable/disable auto-memory, view auto-memory entries
Initialize project with CLAUDE.md guide. Set CLAUDE_CODE_NEW_INIT=1 for interactive flow with skills, hooks, memory
Visualize current context usage as a colored grid with optimization suggestions
Compact conversation to free context. Pass focus instructions to guide what is preserved
commands.example: /compact focus on the auth flow changes

commands.description: Enter plan mode — Claude proposes all changes for your review before execution
commands.example: /plan refactor the auth middleware to use JWT
commands.notes: Best practice for all non-trivial tasks

commands.description: Draft a plan in an ultraplan session, review in browser, then execute remotely or send back to terminal
commands.example: /ultraplan migrate the entire API layer to TypeScript

commands.description: Manage allow/ask/deny rules for tool permissions. Opens interactive dialog
List and manage background tasks
Create, update, list, or run cloud scheduled tasks. Claude walks through setup conversationally
Open interactive diff viewer showing uncommitted changes and per-turn diffs. Use arrow keys to browse
Fetch and display comments from a GitHub PR. Auto-detects current branch PR or pass URL/number
Analyze pending changes on current branch for security vulnerabilities (injection, auth, data exposure)
Manage MCP server connections and OAuth authentication. MCP prompts appear as /mcp__server__prompt commands
Manage Claude Code plugins
Reload all active plugins without restarting. Reports counts and errors
List available skills (built-in and custom in .claude/skills/)
View hook configurations for tool events
Manage agent configurations
Manage IDE integrations (VS Code, JetBrains) and show connection status
Add a working directory for file access in the current session
Continue current session in Claude Code Desktop app
Show QR code to download the Claude mobile app
Configure Claude in Chrome settings for web automation and testing
Make session available for remote control from claude.ai
Export current conversation as plain text. With filename writes to file; without opens copy/save dialog
Copy last assistant response to clipboard. Pass N to copy Nth-latest. Press w in picker to write to file
Show version, model, account, and connectivity status. Works while Claude is responding
Show token usage statistics and subscription billing details
Show plan usage limits and rate limit status
Generate report analyzing your Claude Code sessions — project areas, interaction patterns, friction points
Visualize daily usage, session history, streaks, model preferences
Sign in to your Anthropic account
Sign out from your Anthropic account
Diagnose and verify Claude Code installation and settings
commands.notes: Run first when something feels off

commands.description: Submit feedback or bug reports about Claude Code
commands.example: /feedback the diff viewer sometimes freezes on large files

commands.description: View full changelog with most recent version first
Open upgrade page to switch to a higher plan tier
Set up Claude GitHub Actions app — walks through repo selection and configuration
Install Claude Slack app — opens browser for OAuth flow
Discover Claude Code features through quick interactive lessons with animated demos
Order Claude Code stickers
Orchestrate large-scale changes in parallel across your codebase. Researches → decomposes into 5–30 units → presents plan → spawns parallel agents in git worktrees
commands.example: /batch migrate all React class components to hooks

commands.description: Enable debug logging and troubleshoot issues by reading the session debug log
commands.example: /debug why is the API returning 403 on login

commands.description: Run a prompt repeatedly on an interval while the session stays open. Useful for polling deploys
Review recently changed files for code reuse, quality, and efficiency. Spawns 3 review agents in parallel
Load Claude API reference (Python, TS, Java, Go, Ruby, C#, PHP, cURL) and Agent SDK refs. Covers tool use, streaming, batches, structured outputs

general.description: Toggle verbose output (shows detailed tool usage)
Open current prompt in default text editor
Background a running task (press twice on tmux)
Toggle task list in terminal status area
Kill all background agents (press twice within 3s to confirm)
Cycle permission modes: default → acceptEdits → plan → auto/bypassPermissions
Switch model without clearing your current prompt

text_editing.description: Delete to end of line (stores for paste)
Delete from cursor to line start

navigation.description: Jump to next occurrence of character

permission_modes.description: Claude asks permission before each action. Safest for new projects.
Claude auto-accepts file edits without prompting. Still asks for shell commands.
Claude drafts all changes in plan mode for your review before any execution.
ML classifier auto-approves safe operations. Still requires approval for dangerous actions.
Skip all permission prompts. Use only in sandboxed/trusted environments.

input_prefixes.description: Command and skill autocomplete — see the full command menu
Bash mode — run shell commands directly. Output added to conversation context. Supports Tab autocomplete and Ctrl+B backgrounding
File path mention — triggers autocomplete for files in your working directory

cli_flags.description: Print response without interactive mode (SDK/scripting mode)
Continue most recent conversation in current directory
Resume specific session by ID or name
Set display name for this session
Start in an isolated git worktree branch
Set model at startup (aliases: sonnet, opus)
Begin in a specific permission mode
Create a web session on claude.ai
Grant file access to additional directories at startup
Append to the default system prompt
Enable debug mode with optional filters
Skip auto-discovery for faster startup (use with -p)

agents.how_to_spawn: Use the Agent tool with subagent_type parameter, or Claude auto-selects based on task context.
agents.custom_agents_format: Markdown files (AGENT_NAME.md) with tool restrictions and instructions.

built_in.description: General-purpose agent for research, code search, and multi-step tasks
Fast codebase exploration — find files, search code, answer architecture questions
Software architect — designs implementation plans and identifies critical files
Simplify and refine code for maximum clarity while preserving all functionality
Compare implementations against specs, find gaps, missing edge cases. READ-ONLY
Design test strategies, run test suites (pytest/vitest/jest/playwright), verify coverage
Security audits, OWASP Top 10, threat modeling, dependency CVE scanning, secrets detection
Challenge assumptions, identify risks, score confidence, find failure modes
System architecture, API design, database architecture, ADRs, Mermaid diagrams. No code
API docs (OpenAPI), READMEs, developer guides, migration guides, changelogs
PRDs, user stories with acceptance criteria, MVP scope, RICE/MoSCoW prioritization. No code
Research technologies, compare frameworks, evaluate libraries, produce structured briefs
Market sizing (TAM/SAM/SOM), competitive analysis, pricing strategy, SaaS unit economics
Native iOS/SwiftUI code — views, navigation, Swift concurrency, SwiftData, HealthKit/CloudKit
React Native / Expo — screens, navigation, FlashList, Reanimated, MMKV, NativeWind
Production Rust — ownership, async Tokio, axum/sqlx/serde, error handling, benchmarks
Optimize React, Next.js, React Native, iOS performance. Profiling-first approach
CI/CD pipelines, IaC (Terraform/Pulumi), deployment strategies, monitoring, rollback plans
AI/LLM system design, multi-agent orchestration, RAG, tool schemas, prompt engineering
UX audits (Nielsen's 10), user journey mapping, information architecture, WCAG 2.2 AA
Visual QA — validate UI across viewports, component states, interactions, accessibility
Design tokens, component libraries (atomic design), multi-theme architecture, WCAG compliance
Editorial calendars, content briefs, brand voice, SEO content planning, distribution strategy
Discord/Telegram/Discourse engagement, moderation, event planning, growth strategies
Answer questions about Claude Code features, hooks, MCP servers, settings, IDE integrations
Configure the Claude Code status line setting

changelog.release_notes_raw:
## What's changed

- Fixed a crash in the permission dialog when an agent teams teammate requested tool permission

## What's changed

- Fixed "claude-opus-4-7 is temporarily unavailable" for auto mode

## What's changed

- Added `/tui` command and `tui` setting — run `/tui fullscreen` to switch to flicker-free rendering in the same conversation
- Changed `Ctrl+O` to toggle between normal and verbose transcript only; focus view is now toggled separately with the new `/focus` command
- Added push notification tool — Claude can send mobile push notifications when Remote Control and "Push when Claude decides" config are enabled
- Added `autoScrollEnabled` config to disable conversation auto-scroll in fullscreen mode
- Added option to show Claude's last response as commented context in the `Ctrl+G` external editor (enable via `/config`)
- Improved `/plugin` Installed tab — items needing attention and favorites appear at the top, disabled items are hidden behind a fold, and `f` favorites the selected item
- Improved `/doctor` to warn when an MCP server is defined in multiple config scopes with different endpoints
- `--resume`/`--continue` now resurrects unexpired scheduled tasks
- `/autocompact`, `/context`, `/exit`, and `/reload-plugins` now work from Remote Control (mobile/web) clients
- Write tool now informs the model when you edit the proposed content in the IDE diff before accepting
- Bash tool now enforces the documented maximum timeout instead of accepting arbitrarily large values
- SDK/headless sessions now read `TRACEPARENT`/`TRACESTATE` from the environment for distributed trace linking
- Session recap is now enabled for users with telemetry disabled (Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry, `DISABLE_TELEMETRY`). Opt out via `/config` or `CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY=0`.
- Fixed MCP tool calls hanging indefinitely when the server connection drops mid-response on SSE/HTTP transports
- Fixed non-streaming fallback retries causing multi-minute hangs when the API is unreachable
- Fixed session recap, local slash-command output, and other system status lines not appearing in focus mode
- Fixed high CPU usage in fullscreen when text is selected while a tool i

parsed_changes.text: Added `/tui` command and `tui` setting — run `/tui fullscreen` to switch to flicker-free rendering in the same conversation
Changed `Ctrl+O` to toggle between normal and verbose transcript only; focus view is now toggled separately with the new `/focus` command
Added option to show Claude's last response as commented context in the `Ctrl+G` external editor (enable via `/config`)
Improved `/plugin` Installed tab — items needing attention and favorites appear at the top, disabled items are hidden behind a fold, and `f` favorites the selected item
Improved `/doctor` to warn when an MCP server is defined in multiple config scopes with different endpoints
`/autocompact`, `/context`, `/exit`, and `/reload-plugins` now work from Remote Control (mobile/web) clients
SDK/headless sessions now read `TRACEPARENT`/`TRACESTATE` from the environment for distributed trace linking
Session recap is now enabled for users with telemetry disabled (Bedrock, Vertex, Foundry, `DISABLE_TELEMETRY`). Opt out via `/config` or `CLAUDE_CODE_ENABLE_AWAY_SUMMARY=0`.
Fixed MCP tool calls hanging indefinitely when the server connection drops mid-response on SSE/HTTP transports
Fixed plugin install not honoring dependencies declared in `plugin.json` when the marketplace entry omits them; `/plugin` install now lists auto-installed dependencies
Fixed `--resume` sometimes showing the first prompt instead of the `/rename` name for sessions still running or exited uncleanly
Fixed dropped keystrokes after the CLI relaunches (e.g. `/tui`, provider setup wizards)
Fixed headless/SDK session auto-title firing an extra Haiku request when `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC` or `CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_TERMINAL_TITLE` is set
Fixed `/skills` menu not scrolling when the list overflows the modal in fullscreen mode

changelog.release_notes_raw:
## What's changed

- Improved the extended-thinking indicator with a rotating progress hint

## What's changed

- Show thinking hints sooner during long operations

## What's changed

- Added `/team-onboarding` command to generate a teammate ramp-up guide from your local Claude Code usage
- Added OS CA certificate store trust by default, so enterprise TLS proxies work without extra setup (set `CLAUDE_CODE_CERT_STORE=bundled` to use only bundled CAs)
- `/ultraplan` and other remote-session features now auto-create a default cloud environment instead of requiring web setup first
- Improved brief mode to retry once when Claude responds with plain text instead of a structured message
- Improved focus mode: Claude now writes more self-contained summaries since it knows you only see its final message
- Improved tool-not-available errors to explain why and how to proceed when the model calls a tool that exists but isn't available in the current context
- Improved rate-limit retry messages to show which limit was hit and when it resets instead of an opaque seconds countdown
- Improved refusal error messages to include the API-provided explanation when available
- Improved `claude -p --resume <name>` to accept session titles set via `/rename` or `--name`
- Improved settings resilience: an unrecognized hook event name in `settings.json` no longer causes the entire file to be ignored
- Improved plugin hooks from plugins force-enabled by managed settings to run when `allowManagedHooksOnly` is set
- Improved `/plugin` and `claude plugin update` to show a warning when the marketplace could not be refreshed, instead of silently reporting a stale version
- Improved plan mode to hide the "Refine with Ultraplan" option when the user's org or auth setup can't reach Claude Code on the web
- Improved beta tracing to honor `OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS`, `OTEL_LOG_TOOL_DETAILS`, and `OTEL_LOG_TOOL_CONTENT`; sensitive span attributes are no longer emitted unless opted in
- Improved SDK `query()` to clean up subprocess and temp files when consumers `break` from `for await` or use `await using`
- Fixed a command injection vulnerability in the POSIX `which` fa

parsed_changes.text: Added `/team-onboarding` command to generate a teammate ramp-up guide from your local Claude Code usage
`/ultraplan` and other remote-session features now auto-create a default cloud environment instead of requiring web setup first
Improved `claude -p --resume <name>` to accept session titles set via `/rename` or `--name`
Improved `/plugin` and `claude plugin update` to show a warning when the marketplace could not be refreshed, instead of silently reporting a stale version
Fixed a crash on `--resume` when a persisted Edit/Write tool result was missing its `file_path`
Fixed sub-agents running in isolated worktrees being denied Read/Edit access to files inside their own worktree

Fixed several `/resume` picker issues: narrow default view hiding sessions from other projects, unreachable preview on Windows Terminal, incorrect cwd in worktrees, session-not-found errors not surfacing in stderr, terminal title not being set, and resume hint overlapping the prompt input
Fixed `/btw` writing a copy of the entire conversation to disk on every use
Fixed `/context` Free space and Messages breakdown disagreeing with the header percentage

Fixed several plugin issues: slash commands resolving to the wrong plugin with duplicate `name:` frontmatter, `/plugin update` failing with `ENAMETOOLONG`, Discover showing already-installed plugins, directory-source plugins loading from a stale version cache, and skills not honoring `context: fork` and `agent` frontmatter fields
Fixed the `/mcp` menu offering OAuth-specific actions for MCP servers configured with `headersHelper`; Reconnect is now offered instead to re-invoke the helper script
Fixed `/login` OAuth URL rendering with padding that prevented clean mouse selection
Fixed in-app settings writes (e.g. `/add-dir --remember`, `/config`) not refreshing the in-memory snapshot, preventing removed directories from being revoked mid-session
Fixed custom keybindings (`~/.claude/keybindings.json`) not loading on Bedrock, Vertex, and other third-party providers

Fixed several Remote Control issues: worktrees removed on session crash, connection failures not persisting in the transcript, spurious "Disconnected" indicator in brief mode for local sessions, and `/remote-control` failing over SSH when only `CLAUDE_CODE_ORGANIZATION_UUID` is set
Fixed `/insights` sometimes omitting the report file link from its response

changelog.release_notes_raw:
## What's changed

- Added `/team-onboarding` command to generate a teammate ramp-up guide from your local Claude Code usage
- Added OS CA certificate store trust by default, so enterprise TLS proxies work without extra setup (set `CLAUDE_CODE_CERT_STORE=bundled` to use only bundled CAs)
- `/ultraplan` and other remote-session features now auto-create a default cloud environment instead of requiring web setup first
- Improved brief mode to retry once when Claude responds with plain text instead of a structured message
- Improved focus mode: Claude now writes more self-contained summaries since it knows you only see its final message
- Improved tool-not-available errors to explain why and how to proceed when the model calls a tool that exists but isn't available in the current context
- Improved rate-limit retry messages to show which limit was hit and when it resets instead of an opaque seconds countdown
- Improved refusal error messages to include the API-provided explanation when available
- Improved `claude -p --resume <name>` to accept session titles set via `/rename` or `--name`
- Improved settings resilience: an unrecognized hook event name in `settings.json` no longer causes the entire file to be ignored
- Improved plugin hooks from plugins force-enabled by managed settings to run when `allowManagedHooksOnly` is set
- Improved `/plugin` and `claude plugin update` to show a warning when the marketplace could not be refreshed, instead of silently reporting a stale version
- Improved plan mode to hide the "Refine with Ultraplan" option when the user's org or auth setup can't reach Claude Code on the web
- Improved beta tracing to honor `OTEL_LOG_USER_PROMPTS`, `OTEL_LOG_TOOL_DETAILS`, and `OTEL_LOG_TOOL_CONTENT`; sensitive span attributes are no longer emitted unless opted in
- Improved SDK `query()` to clean up subprocess and temp files when consumers `break` from `for await` or use `await using`
- Fixed a command injection vulnerability in the POSIX `which` fa

`/ultraplan` and other remote-session features now auto-create a default cloud environment instead of requiring web setup first
Improved `claude -p --resume <name>` to accept session titles set via `/rename` or `--name`
Improved `/plugin` and `claude plugin update` to show a warning when the marketplace could not be refreshed, instead of silently reporting a stale version
Fixed a crash on `--resume` when a persisted Edit/Write tool result was missing its `file_path`
Fixed sub-agents running in isolated worktrees being denied Read/Edit access to files inside their own worktree

Fixed several `/resume` picker issues: narrow default view hiding sessions from other projects, unreachable preview on Windows Terminal, incorrect cwd in worktrees, session-not-found errors not surfacing in stderr, terminal title not being set, and resume hint overlapping the prompt input
Fixed `/btw` writing a copy of the entire conversation to disk on every use
Fixed `/context` Free space and Messages breakdown disagreeing with the header percentage

Fixed several plugin issues: slash commands resolving to the wrong plugin with duplicate `name:` frontmatter, `/plugin update` failing with `ENAMETOOLONG`, Discover showing already-installed plugins, directory-source plugins loading from a stale version cache, and skills not honoring `context: fork` and `agent` frontmatter fields
Fixed the `/mcp` menu offering OAuth-specific actions for MCP servers configured with `headersHelper`; Reconnect is now offered instead to re-invoke the helper script
Fixed `/login` OAuth URL rendering with padding that prevented clean mouse selection
Fixed in-app settings writes (e.g. `/add-dir --remember`, `/config`) not refreshing the in-memory snapshot, preventing removed directories from being revoked mid-session
Fixed custom keybindings (`~/.claude/keybindings.json`) not loading on Bedrock, Vertex, and other third-party providers

Fixed several Remote Control issues: worktrees removed on session crash, connection failures not persisting in the transcript, spurious "Disconnected" indicator in brief mode for local sessions, and `/remote-control` failing over SSH when only `CLAUDE_CODE_ORGANIZATION_UUID` is set
Fixed `/insights` sometimes omitting the report file link from its response

changelog.release_notes_raw:
## What's changed

- Added focus view toggle (`Ctrl+O`) in `NO_FLICKER` mode showing prompt, one-line tool summary with edit diffstats, and final response
- Added `refreshInterval` status line setting to re-run the status line command every N seconds
- Added `workspace.git_worktree` to the status line JSON input, set when the current directory is inside a linked git worktree
- Added `● N running` indicator in `/agents` next to agent types with live subagent instances
- Added syntax highlighting for Cedar policy files (`.cedar`, `.cedarpolicy`)
- Fixed `--dangerously-skip-permissions` being silently downgraded to accept-edits mode after approving a write to a protected path
- Fixed and hardened Bash tool permissions, tightening checks around env-var prefixes and network redirects, and reducing false prompts on common commands
- Fixed permission rules with names matching JavaScript prototype properties (e.g. `toString`) causing `settings.json` to be silently ignored
- Fixed managed-settings allow rules remaining active after an admin removed them until process restart
- Fixed `permissions.additionalDirectories` changes in settings not applying mid-session
- Fixed removing a directory from `settings.permissions.additionalDirectories` revoking access to the same directory passed via `--add-dir`
- Fixed MCP HTTP/SSE connections accumulating ~50 MB/hr of unreleased buffers when servers reconnect
- Fixed MCP OAuth `oauth.authServerMetadataUrl` not being honored on token refresh after restart, fixing ADFS and similar IdPs
- Fixed 429 retries burning all attempts in ~13 seconds when the server returns a small `Retry-After` — exponential backoff now applies as a minimum
- Fixed rate-limit upgrade options disappearing after context compaction
- Fixed several `/resume` picker issues: `--resume <name>` opening uneditable, Ctrl+A reload wiping search, empty list swallowing navigation, task-status text replacing conversation summary, and cross-project staleness
- Fixed file-edit d

parsed_changes.text: Added `● N running` indicator in `/agents` next to agent types with live subagent instances
Fixed MCP HTTP/SSE connections accumulating ~50 MB/hr of unreleased buffers when servers reconnect

Fixed several `/resume` picker issues: `--resume <name>` opening uneditable, Ctrl+A reload wiping search, empty list swallowing navigation, task-status text replacing conversation summary, and cross-project staleness
Fixed Shift+Enter and Alt/Cmd+arrow shortcuts not working in Warp with `NO_FLICKER` mode
Fixed Korean/Japanese/Unicode text becoming garbled when copied in no-flicker mode on Windows
Improved slash command and `@`-mention completion to trigger after CJK sentence punctuation, so Japanese/Chinese input no longer requires a space before `/` or `@`
Updated `/claude-api` skill to cover Managed Agents alongside the Claude API

changelog.release_notes_raw:
## What's changed

- Fixed Bedrock requests failing with `403 "Authorization header is missing"` when using `AWS_BEARER_TOKEN_BEDROCK` or `CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_BEDROCK_AUTH` (regression in 2.1.94)

## What's changed

- Added `forceRemoteSettingsRefresh` policy setting: when set, the CLI blocks startup until remote managed settings are freshly fetched, and exits if the fetch fails (fail-closed)
- Added interactive Bedrock setup wizard accessible from the login screen when selecting "3rd-party platform" — guides you through AWS authentication, region configuration, credential verification, and model pinning
- Added per-model and cache-hit breakdown to `/cost` for subscription users
- `/release-notes` is now an interactive version picker
- Remote Control session names now use your hostname as the default prefix (e.g. `myhost-graceful-unicorn`), overridable with `--remote-control-session-name-prefix`
- Pro users now see a footer hint when returning to a session after the prompt cache has expired, showing roughly how many tokens the next turn will send uncached
- Fixed subagent spawning permanently failing with "Could not determine pane count" after tmux windows are killed or renumbered during a long-running session
- Fixed prompt-type Stop hooks incorrectly failing when the small fast model returns `ok:false`, and restored `preventContinuation:true` semantics for non-Stop prompt-type hooks
- Fixed tool input validation failures when streaming emits array/object fields as JSON-encoded strings
- Fixed an API 400 error that could occur when extended thinking produced a whitespace-only text block alongside real content
- Fixed accidental feedback survey submissions from auto-pilot keypresses and consecutive-prompt digit collisions
- Fixed misleading "esc to interrupt" hint appearing alongside "esc to clear" when a text selection exists in fullscreen mode during processing
- Fixed Homebrew install update prompts to use the cask's release channel (`claude-code` → stable, `claude-code@latest` → latest)
- Fixed `ctrl+e` jumping to the end of the next line when already at end of line in multiline prompts
- Fixed an issue where the same message could appear at two positions

parsed_changes.text: Added per-model and cache-hit breakdown to `/cost` for subscription users
`/release-notes` is now an interactive version picker
Fixed tool input validation failures when streaming emits array/object fields as JSON-encoded strings
Fixed idle-return "/clear to save X tokens" hint showing cumulative session tokens instead of current context size
Removed `/tag` command
Removed `/vim` command (toggle vim mode via `/config` → Editor mode)
